title: Chord Flow
summary: Banked chord preset browser/editor with per-pad chord controls and User-bank save.

sections.title: Browser
items: Click: load preset and enter edit

sections.title: Edit
items: Pad presses select the active pad
Global Oct (default +2) sets preset-wide octave transpose
Global Trn sets preset-wide semitone transpose
Pad Oct sets per-pad octave transpose
Bass sets slash bass note (or none)
Bank jumps to the selected bank
Reset Patch asks for confirm, then resets all pads to C major/root/no bass
Save row + Jog Right (or Click) saves to User bank

sections.title: Presets
items: Additional presets/*.json load as additional banks
User presets are saved to presets/user.json
